name: Clear Pencil Cup- Brightroom
description:
Practical and good-looking, this Acrylic Pencil Cup from Brightroom™ is a great addition to your work desk. Designed in a rectangular shape, this acrylic pencil cup features an open top for easily accessing pencils or pens when you need them, while the clear, minimalist design adds a touch of modern style to your workstation. Compact in size, this pencil cup easily sits on your desk without occupying much space and helps you neatly organize all your writing implements.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
